macguffins.name: the one ring
macguffins.source: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
macguffins.flavor: one ring to rule them all. extremely light for something that corrupts absolutely.

macguffins.name: a lightsaber
macguffins.flavor: makes a very satisfying noise. should not be pointed at anyone you consider family.

macguffins.name: freddy krueger's bladed glove
macguffins.flavor: handmade, with love. do not wear to sleep.

macguffins.name: pennywise's red balloon
macguffins.flavor: they all float down here. do not follow it into the sewer drain.

macguffins.name: the elder wand
macguffins.source: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 2 (2011)
macguffins.flavor: the most powerful wand ever made. previous owners have had a rough go of it.

macguffins.name: the holy grail
macguffins.source: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
macguffins.flavor: choose wisely. it's not the one with all the jewels.

macguffins.name: the delorean
macguffins.flavor: needs 1.21 gigawatts and a very long road. the doors go up, not out.

macguffins.name: the lament configuration
macguffins.flavor: a puzzle box that opens doors to dimensions of experience beyond imagination. do not solve it.

macguffins.name: the necronomicon ex-mortis
macguffins.flavor: bound in human flesh, inked in blood. not available at your local library.

macguffins.name: aladdin's magic lamp
macguffins.flavor: three wishes. no wishing for more wishes. phenomenal cosmic power, itty bitty living space.

macguffins.name: jason's hockey mask
macguffins.flavor: not for hockey. never actually used for hockey. found near a lake.

macguffins.name: michael myers' mask
macguffins.flavor: a william shatner mask, spray-painted white. whoever made it had no idea what they started.

macguffins.name: ghostface's mask
macguffins.flavor: what's your favorite scary movie? answer carefully.

macguffins.name: leatherface's chainsaw
macguffins.flavor: well-used. do not ask what it has been used on.

macguffins.name: chucky
macguffins.flavor: hi, i'm chucky. wanna play? the correct answer is no.

macguffins.name: a golden ticket
macguffins.flavor: pure imagination. comes with a factory tour you may not survive.

macguffins.name: indy's fedora
macguffins.flavor: it belongs in a museum. (it does not belong in a museum.)

macguffins.name: cobb's spinning top
macguffins.flavor: does it wobble? does it stop? nobody knows. not even the director.

macguffins.name: a proton pack
macguffins.flavor: don't cross the streams. positively charged. extremely heavy. worth it.

macguffins.name: the ruby slippers
macguffins.flavor: there's no place like home. size 5B. clicking required.

macguffins.name: the flux capacitor
macguffins.flavor: 1.21 gigawatts. the thing that makes time travel possible - apparently doc came up with it after hitting his head on a toilet.

macguffins.name: the briefcase
macguffins.flavor: nobody knows what's inside. the glow is warm and golden. some things are better left unopened.

macguffins.name: the suckling
macguffins.flavor: a toxic-waste mutant with family issues and a very specific grudge. the rb9 mascot nobody asked for and everyone deserves.

macguffins.name: annabelle the doll
macguffins.flavor: allegedly just a vessel. does not move on its own. probably.

macguffins.name: the redrum door axe
macguffins.flavor: here's johnny. the door did not survive.

macguffins.name: a xenomorph facehugger (preserved)
macguffins.flavor: hermetically sealed for your protection. do not open. do not even look at it too long.

macguffins.name: the vhs tape
macguffins.flavor: you will receive a phone call after viewing. do not view.

macguffins.name: the babadook pop-up book
macguffins.flavor: dook dook dook. once you've read it, you can't make it go away. the pop-ups are surprisingly well-crafted.

macguffins.name: handbook for the recently deceased
macguffins.flavor: practical guide for the newly dead. the print is very small and the advice is worse.

macguffins.name: ash's chainsaw hand
macguffins.flavor: groovy. self-attaching. requires no hand underneath.

macguffins.name: a red swingline stapler
macguffins.flavor: not the standard model. do not move it. do not touch it. he will burn the building down.

macguffins.name: wilson the volleyball
macguffins.flavor: a companion, a confidant, a best friend. handle with extreme care.

macguffins.name: the dude's rug
macguffins.flavor: it really tied the room together. the fact that it doesn't anymore is a genuine tragedy.

macguffins.name: a leg lamp
macguffins.flavor: a major award. fra-gi-le. must be italian.

macguffins.name: the stonehenge model
macguffins.flavor: eighteen inches. the brief called for eighteen feet. this happens.

macguffins.name: an everlasting gobstopper
macguffins.flavor: never gets any smaller. the flavor changes. do not bite.

macguffins.name: self-lacing nikes
macguffins.source: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
macguffins.flavor: auto-laces on command. arrived several years late but here they are.

macguffins.name: buzz lightyear
macguffins.flavor: to infinity and beyond. not a flying toy. he falls with style.

macguffins.name: the burn book
macguffins.flavor: contains secrets. do not let it fall into the wrong hands. all hands are the wrong hands.

macguffins.name: the golden idol
macguffins.flavor: weighs exactly as much as a bag of sand, allegedly. this has never once worked out.

macguffins.name: the black pearl in a bottle
macguffins.source: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl (2003)
macguffins.flavor: why is the rum gone. and why is the ship inside this bottle.

macguffins.name: the krabby patty secret formula
macguffins.flavor: the most guarded secret in bikini bottom. nobody has read it. everyone wants it.

macguffins.name: fry's can of slurm
macguffins.flavor: highly addictive. the secret ingredient is best not investigated.

macguffins.name: the omnitrix
macguffins.flavor: aliens inside a watch. attaches permanently. the timeout always happens at the worst possible moment.

macguffins.name: the magic conch shell
macguffins.flavor: all you have to do is ask. the answer is usually nothing. the answer is always correct.

macguffins.name: frank the bunny costume
macguffins.flavor: 28 days, 6 hours, 42 minutes, 12 seconds. that is when the world will end. dress accordingly.

macguffins.name: the pale man's eyeballs
macguffins.flavor: placed in the hands to see. do not place them in your hands.

macguffins.name: se7en's box
macguffins.flavor: what's in the box. you don't want to know what's in the box.

macguffins.name: the poison apple
macguffins.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs (1937)
macguffins.flavor: one bite is all it takes. looks perfectly fine. smells perfectly fine. do not eat it.

macguffins.name: the wicked witch's broomstick
macguffins.flavor: flies without a license. previously owned. the previous owner did not survive the acquisition.

macguffins.name: the room 237 key
macguffins.flavor: wendy, i'm home. do not use this key.

macguffins.name: regan's pea soup bowl
macguffins.flavor: the head spins, the soup flies. do not eat the contents.

macguffins.name: the overlook typewriter
macguffins.flavor: all work and no play makes jack a dull boy. the ribbon needs replacing.

macguffins.name: a black lodge coffee cup
macguffins.source: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk with Me (1992)
macguffins.flavor: damn fine coffee. consumed in a place that does not follow normal rules of space or time.

macguffins.name: sam's burlap sack mask
macguffins.flavor: homemade. do not remove the mask. sam is very particular about the mask.

macguffins.name: carrie's prom dress
macguffins.flavor: they're all gonna laugh at you. they did. it did not go well for them.

macguffins.name: a chestburster (in a jar)
macguffins.flavor: hermetically sealed. pre-emergence. do not shake.

macguffins.name: a pair of sunglasses
macguffins.flavor: obey. consume. marry and reproduce. put them on and see the world as it really is.

macguffins.name: the s.s. georgie
macguffins.flavor: a paper boat. sailed once, not recovered. do not follow it into the storm drain.

macguffins.name: tiffany the bride doll
macguffins.flavor: she came back. she always comes back.

macguffins.name: gizmo the mogwai
macguffins.flavor: bright light, bright light. no water. no food after midnight. these are not suggestions.

macguffins.name: a do not feed after midnight sign
macguffins.flavor: the most important sign in any kitchen. nobody followed the rules. look how that turned out.

macguffins.name: sam's lollipop
macguffins.flavor: candy is just candy until sam gives it to you.

macguffins.name: beetlejuice's striped suit jacket
macguffins.flavor: black and white stripes. say his name three times to see if it fits. do not say his name three times.

macguffins.name: a get out teacup and spoon
macguffins.flavor: the stirring puts you somewhere else. do not follow the sound.

macguffins.name: a cornetto
macguffins.flavor: everything's going to be fine. there's a cornetto involved.

macguffins.name: shaun's bloody cricket bat
macguffins.flavor: used on exactly the kind of things a cricket bat should not be used on.

macguffins.name: the boomstick
macguffins.flavor: this is my boomstick. shop smart, shop s-mart.

macguffins.name: wolfman's silver bullet
macguffins.flavor: the only thing that works. one shot, one chance. keep it somewhere you'll remember.

macguffins.name: a vial of holy water
macguffins.flavor: blessed by a priest. useful in a number of situations you'd rather not be in.

macguffins.name: a wooden stake
macguffins.flavor: hand-sharpened. single use. do not show up without a plan.

macguffins.name: a pair of red ballet shoes
macguffins.flavor: the color is deliberate. the dance does not end well.

macguffins.name: ron burgundy's jazz flute
macguffins.source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
macguffins.flavor: i'm kind of a big deal. the solo is real and it is committed.

macguffins.name: a bottle of sex panther cologne
macguffins.source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
macguffins.flavor: 60% of the time, it works every time. made with actual bits of panther.

macguffins.name: a pair of coconut halves
macguffins.source: Monty Python and the Holy Grail (1975)
macguffins.flavor: clip clop clip clop. the horse budget did not survive pre-production.

macguffins.name: sloth's baby ruth
macguffins.flavor: hey you guys. the bar has been through things. handle with care.

macguffins.name: buddy the elf's syrup spaghetti
macguffins.flavor: the four food groups: candy, candy canes, candy corns, and syrup. this is all four at once.

macguffins.name: a bag of reese's pieces
macguffins.flavor: made first contact possible. the most important candy in cinema history.

macguffins.name: forrest gump's box of chocolates
macguffins.flavor: life is like a box of chocolates. you never know what you're gonna get. some flavors are not great.

macguffins.name: a royale with cheese
macguffins.flavor: what do they call a quarter pounder with cheese in paris? this. they call it this.

macguffins.name: a glass slipper
macguffins.flavor: fits exactly one person in the entire kingdom. impractical. effective.

macguffins.name: forky
macguffins.flavor: i am not a toy. i am trash. made from a spork and pipe cleaners. deeply confused about existence.

macguffins.name: mr. potato head
macguffins.flavor: all parts detachable. comes with several sets of eyes. there is no actual potato involved.

macguffins.name: a loaf of lembas bread
macguffins.source: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
macguffins.flavor: one small bite will fill the stomach of a grown man. most people eat the whole loaf anyway.

macguffins.name: a hitchhiker's towel
macguffins.source: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (2005)
macguffins.flavor: the most massively useful thing an interstellar hitchhiker can have. don't panic.

macguffins.name: a babel fish
macguffins.source: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (2005)
macguffins.flavor: insert into ear to understand any language in the universe. small, yellow, leech-like, and profoundly consequential.

macguffins.name: a stay puft marshmallow man figurine
macguffins.flavor: the most harmless thing ray could think of. this did not work out.

macguffins.name: marty's hoverboard
macguffins.source: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
macguffins.flavor: does not work on water. unless you have power. this one does not have power.

macguffins.name: the orange life vest
macguffins.flavor: worn once, briefly, in 1955. the future's fashion sense has not aged well.

macguffins.name: the shark tooth necklace
macguffins.flavor: you're gonna need a bigger boat. the tooth came off something that definitely required one.

macguffins.name: the sled named rosebud
macguffins.flavor: the meaning of a man's entire life, reduced to one word. it was the sled.

macguffins.name: dorothy's picnic basket
macguffins.flavor: toto was in here at some point. carried through a tornado. still functional.

macguffins.name: mary poppins' umbrella
macguffins.flavor: practically perfect in every way. the parrot handle has opinions.

macguffins.name: mary poppins' carpet bag
macguffins.flavor: contains a coat rack, a lamp, a hat stand, and a large mirror. bigger on the inside.

macguffins.name: the black knight's helmet
macguffins.source: Monty Python and the Holy Grail (1975)
macguffins.flavor: 'tis but a scratch. comes with the confidence of someone who has clearly lost.

macguffins.name: napoleon dynamite's moon boots
macguffins.flavor: skills. you need skills. the boots arrived before the skills did.

macguffins.name: the vote for pedro shirt
macguffins.flavor: vote for pedro. pedro offers you his protection.

macguffins.name: ron burgundy's scotch glass
macguffins.source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
macguffins.flavor: scotchy scotch scotch. i love scotch. it's so good.

macguffins.name: the sex panther display box
macguffins.source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
macguffins.flavor: a fine display case for a fine cologne. the velvet lining still carries the scent.

macguffins.name: lloyd christmas' orange tuxedo
macguffins.flavor: the most confident fashion choice in cinema. wore it to a black tie event. not invited back.

macguffins.name: harry dunne's blue tuxedo
macguffins.flavor: the matching counterpart to the orange. these two belong together.

macguffins.name: wayne's world cap
macguffins.flavor: not worthy. excellent.

macguffins.name: garth's drumsticks
macguffins.flavor: party on, garth. he plays fife in the marching band and also these.

macguffins.name: the dude's white russian
macguffins.flavor: kahlua, vodka, cream. the dude abides. this is a beverage.

macguffins.name: a bowling ball bag
macguffins.flavor: contains a bowling ball. unless it doesn't. that's kind of the whole thing.

macguffins.name: ferris bueller's vest
macguffins.flavor: life moves pretty fast. if you don't stop and look around once in a while, you could miss it. also this vest.

macguffins.name: cameron's red wings jersey
macguffins.flavor: cameron is so uptight. but the jersey is genuinely cool.

macguffins.name: the zissou red beanie
macguffins.source: The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou (2004)
macguffins.flavor: team zissou. the jaguar shark took someone he loved. the beanie remained.

macguffins.name: the little miss sunshine pageant crown
macguffins.flavor: olive just wanted to be in the pageant. she was in the pageant. it was memorable.

macguffins.name: wall-e's plant boot
macguffins.flavor: found growing in an old boot. the last living plant on earth, kept alive by a very small robot.

macguffins.name: carl's grape soda pin
macguffins.flavor: adventure is out there. this pin meant everything to two people and now it means everything to you.

macguffins.name: a pizza planet cup
macguffins.flavor: a collector's item from pizza planet. buzz lightyear may have been found nearby.

macguffins.name: andy's cowboy hat
macguffins.flavor: reach for the sky. woody wore it first. andy wore it once and then left it in a box for years.

macguffins.name: barbie's pink cowboy hat
macguffins.flavor: you are kenough. the hat is also kenough.

macguffins.name: ken's mojo dojo casa house sign
macguffins.flavor: it's a mojo dojo. it's also a casa. it's a house. the name covers all the bases.

macguffins.name: an orange mocha frappuccino cup
macguffins.flavor: orange mocha frappuccino! a beverage that launched a thousand bad decisions.

macguffins.name: homer's emergency donut
macguffins.flavor: mmm, forbidden donut. kept for emergencies. every emergency has required it.

macguffins.name: a can of duff beer
macguffins.flavor: can't get enough of that wonderful duff.

macguffins.name: bart's slingshot
macguffins.flavor: eat my shorts. responsible for a number of broken windows.

macguffins.name: cartman's bag of cheesy poofs
macguffins.flavor: oh my god. cheesy poofs.

macguffins.name: kenny's orange hood
macguffins.flavor: he dies a lot. the hood always comes back.

macguffins.name: bender's empty beer can
macguffins.flavor: bite my shiny metal can. empty. has been empty for some time.

macguffins.name: spongebob's ripped pants
macguffins.flavor: he ripped his pants. everyone thought it was funny. then they thought it was less funny.

macguffins.name: patrick's wallet
macguffins.flavor: mayo is not an instrument. the wallet contents remain unclear.

macguffins.name: arnold's banana costume
macguffins.flavor: head downtown with your best strawberry friend.

macguffins.name: tommy pickles' screwdriver
macguffins.flavor: a baby with a screwdriver. everything is an adventure. the adults are not aware.

macguffins.name: hank hill's propane tank
macguffins.flavor: i sell propane and propane accessories. this is propane. it is a quality product.

macguffins.name: a halloween mask (heist edition)
macguffins.flavor: a cheap halloween store copy. worn once during a heist. the original is considerably more famous.

macguffins.name: billy the puppet
macguffins.flavor: i want to play a game. the tricycle is not included.

macguffins.name: kitten mittens
macguffins.flavor: is your cat making too much noise all the time? finally, a solution nobody asked for.

macguffins.name: rum ham
macguffins.flavor: ham soaked in rum. lost at sea, found in the heart. frank would like it back immediately.

macguffins.name: the green man suit
macguffins.flavor: full-body confidence in a color that refuses to be ignored. do not wear to court.

macguffins.name: mac's duster
macguffins.flavor: not a costume. not for sale. dramatically less intimidating than intended.

macguffins.name: a can of fight milk
macguffins.flavor: for bodyguards, by bodyguards. packed with crowtein and questionable life choices.

macguffins.name: the D.E.N.N.I.S. system binder
macguffins.flavor: a laminated roadmap to being the worst person in the room. please do not follow it.

macguffins.name: archer the gorgonite action figure
macguffins.flavor: leader of the gorgonites. small enough for a shelf, noble enough for a war room.

macguffins.name: baxter the dog
macguffins.source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
macguffins.flavor: a tiny gentleman with excellent judgment. knows more languages than expected.

macguffins.name: the skull of argall
macguffins.flavor: ancient, ominous, and probably not something you should keep on your desk.

macguffins.name: a bag of blue meth
macguffins.flavor: suspiciously blue. chemistry this recognizable usually comes with consequences.

macguffins.name: the bone tomahawk
macguffins.flavor: primitive, brutal, and best admired from a very respectful distance.

macguffins.name: the noisy cricket
macguffins.flavor: tiny alien hardware with deeply unfair recoil. aim carefully and brace everything.

macguffins.name: a warp ring
macguffins.flavor: throw it, jump through it, hope you thought about the destination first.

macguffins.name: one of sonic's quills
macguffins.flavor: still buzzing with speed. handle gently unless you enjoy blown fuses.

macguffins.name: a whale penis bone
macguffins.flavor: technically a display piece. emotionally, a warning sign.

macguffins.name: a brand new tecca chair
macguffins.flavor: fresh out of the box and already carrying suspicious corporate energy.

macguffins.name: sloppy steaks from truffoni's
macguffins.source: I Think You Should Leave with Tim Robinson (TV)
macguffins.flavor: a big rare cut of meat with water dumped all over it. they can't stop you from ordering steak.

macguffins.name: ratbat
macguffins.flavor: for basement problems, sewer problems, and every other problem the gang should not solve themselves.

macguffins.name: a can of wolf cola
macguffins.flavor: the official soft drink of poor decisions. goes down smooth in all the wrong markets.

macguffins.name: the holy hand grenade
macguffins.source: Monty Python and the Holy Grail (1975)
macguffins.flavor: first shalt thou count to three. not two, unless thou then proceed to three.

macguffins.name: a swedish-made penis enlargement pump
macguffins.source: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
macguffins.flavor: that sort of thing is not anyone's bag, baby. came with a warranty and several denials.

macguffins.name: a batarang
macguffins.flavor: shaped like a bat, thrown like a warning, somehow always comes back dramatically.

macguffins.name: a husk of corn
macguffins.flavor: dry, dusty, and extremely important to the future of humanity. probably.

macguffins.name: a slice of pie with a pube in it
macguffins.flavor: homemade, ceremonial, and deeply not okay. do not ask about the ingredients.

macguffins.name: a Donald
macguffins.flavor: loyal, professional, and somehow still reporting for duty after everything.

macguffins.name: cecil's pocket teleporter
macguffins.flavor: instant escape, eye-watering invoice. one use costs more than the gross economic output of lichtenstein.

macguffins.name: a meeseeks box
macguffins.flavor: press the button, make a request, regret the wording. existence is pain.

macguffins.name: a demonic embalmed hand
macguffins.flavor: light the candle, hold the hand, say the words. maybe stop before the party gets weird.

macguffins.name: a handmade paimon crown
macguffins.flavor: tiny, handmade, and carrying the worst possible family legacy.

macguffins.name: a blood test kit
macguffins.flavor: heat the wire and watch closely. paranoia is just procedure out here.

macguffins.name: a friendship bracelet
macguffins.flavor: cute, handmade, and carrying more history than either friend wants to admit.

macguffins.name: a cursed coat button
macguffins.flavor: small enough to lose, cursed enough to ruin your entire week.

macguffins.name: a dusty camera with low battery and full footage
macguffins.flavor: found in the woods. low battery, full tape, absolutely no comforting answers.

macguffins.name: Awesome Mix Vol. 2
macguffins.flavor: the tape still works. the feelings also still work. no skipping, especially not side b.

macguffins.name: Blind Man's Cane
macguffins.flavor: collapsible, discreet, and mostly there so everyone keeps underestimating the wrong guy.

macguffins.name: Kimoyo Beads
macguffins.flavor: tiny wakandan tech doing the work of a phone, a doctor, and a miracle.

macguffins.name: Sling Ring
macguffins.flavor: opens doors to anywhere, assuming you can stop making nervous circles with your hand.

macguffins.name: Orange Slices
macguffins.flavor: post-fight refreshments for tiny heroes and exhausted adults.

macguffins.name: Class Protector Umbrella
macguffins.flavor: proof that sometimes the whole school knows exactly who saved them.

macguffins.name: Toy Dinosaurs
macguffins.flavor: curse your sudden but inevitable betrayal. kept on the console for tactical morale.

macguffins.name: Mr. Pointy
macguffins.flavor: hand-carved, sentimental, and extremely effective against bad dates with fangs.

macguffins.name: Fruity Oaty Bar
macguffins.flavor: a cheerful little snack ad with a deeply inconvenient trigger phrase baked in.

macguffins.name: Freeze Ray
macguffins.flavor: stops time, sort of. mostly useful for awkward feelings and questionable plans.

macguffins.name: Jar of Dirt
macguffins.source: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest (2006)
macguffins.flavor: he's got a jar of dirt. guess what's inside it. do not drop it while celebrating.

macguffins.name: Compass That Doesn't Point North
macguffins.source: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl (2003)
macguffins.flavor: points to what you want most, which is usually trouble.

macguffins.name: Tannis Root Charm
macguffins.flavor: smells awful, looks worse, and came from neighbors who are much too friendly.

macguffins.name: Protomolecule Sample
macguffins.flavor: glowing blue alien weirdness in a sealed tube. the seal is doing a lot of work here.

macguffins.name: Truffle Pig
macguffins.flavor: beloved, irreplaceable, and worth burning the entire underworld down to find.

macguffins.name: Wonder Bread Firesuit
macguffins.source: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby (2006)
macguffins.flavor: if you're not first, you're last. flame-resistant, sponsor-heavy, and deeply american.

macguffins.name: Single Perfect Tear
macguffins.flavor: one dramatic tear from the baddest boy in baltimore. handle with sincerity.

macguffins.name: Airway Briefcase
macguffins.flavor: money in the case. transponder in the money. mistake already made.

macguffins.name: Cattle Bolt
macguffins.flavor: call it. just call it.

macguffins.name: Hula Hoop
macguffins.flavor: you know, for kids.

macguffins.name: Woodchipper Hat
macguffins.flavor: good hat. cold morning. bad errand.

macguffins.name: Barton Fink Wallpaper
macguffins.flavor: peeling quietly in a room where the heat will not break.

macguffins.name: Fogbound Gold
macguffins.flavor: stolen gold. old blood. the fog comes back for both.

macguffins.name: Chess Wizard
macguffins.flavor: the computer cheats. macready cheats back.

macguffins.name: Snake's Eyepatch
macguffins.flavor: name's plissken. heard he was dead.

macguffins.name: Nada's Shotgun
macguffins.flavor: put on the glasses. pick up the gun. keep moving.

macguffins.name: Christine's Key
macguffins.flavor: turn the key. let her idle. she remembers everything.

macguffins.name: Blue Key
macguffins.flavor: the key is blue. the box is blue. after that, things become difficult.

macguffins.name: Log Lady's Log
macguffins.flavor: the log has seen things. margaret listens. maybe you should too.

macguffins.name: Eraserhead Baby Blanket
macguffins.flavor: swaddled tight. the room hums. no one is sleeping.

macguffins.name: Club Silencio Microphone
macguffins.flavor: no hay banda. there is no band. and still, you hear it.

macguffins.name: Red Room Curtain
macguffins.source: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk with Me (1992)
macguffins.flavor: red velvet. no wind. something moves behind it anyway.

macguffins.name: Stomach VCR
macguffins.flavor: a soft opening in the abdomen. insert the cassette and observe the signal.

macguffins.name: Brundlefly Telepod Part
macguffins.flavor: component recovered from telepod two. sterilization incomplete.

macguffins.name: Mugwump Typewriter
macguffins.flavor: chitin keys. wet advice. the report is due.

macguffins.name: Scanners Headband
macguffins.flavor: pressure builds quickly. meetings should be kept short.

macguffins.name: GamePod
macguffins.flavor: warm to the touch. accepts a bio-port connection. do not share hardware.

macguffins.name: Hattori Hanzo Sword
macguffins.flavor: if you're looking for revenge, accept no substitutes.

macguffins.name: Big Kahuna Burger
macguffins.flavor: that is a tasty burger. mind if anyone has a bite?

macguffins.name: Red Apple Cigarettes
macguffins.flavor: goes down smooth. everybody in town seems to know the brand.

macguffins.name: Bride's Yellow Suit
macguffins.flavor: bright yellow. blood shows up real nice on it.

macguffins.name: Inglourious Pipe
macguffins.flavor: enormous, theatrical, and best used while making someone nervous.
